sentences.text: Hey, Kenny good afternoon. This is Jordan kobe over at rentable. Sorry. I missed you here. I was hoping to connect for a minute or two just ask you a couple questions. I'll follow up with an email if it's easier you can just respond there or give me a call back when you get a couple of minutes that number is three one seven seven two zero three two six six, thank you.

Thank you for calling first priority management our business hours are Monday through Friday from eight AM to five PM our office closes for lunch from noon until one PM if you wish to contact someone directly or leave a voicemail by extension please press one for our directory. If this is a number. If you know the extension of the person you are calling dial that extension number followed by the pound sign for Kenny Cunningham dial extension one zero one. Please enter the extension followed by the pound sign of the person you are trying to reach. Your call is being transferred please hold. You've reached the desk of Kenny Cunningham at first priority management, I'm sorry, Kenny is unavailable to take your call. Right now. Please leave a message at the tone and he'll return your call as soon as possible. Thank you. At the tone please record your message. When you finished recording you may hang up or press one for more options to leave a call back number press five.

conversation.title: Call: Jordan Culp and Kenneth Cunningham @ First Priority Management
